format_lock_name: WML Legal Evidence / Issuer Review Packet Format Lock
purpose: Reusable WML Legal PDF + outbound email format memory for future dispute/evidence packets. Use this format when Ben says to use the saved WML format, research save, format lock, or the legal-team packet style.
footer_requirements: no extra slogan or identity text under the logo
website link must be clickable: https://wemakelawlegal.com
email link must be clickable: mailto:legal@wemakelawlegal.com
no defensive attorney-client disclaimer unless Ben explicitly requests it
no internal record-use/outside-counsel/personal-archive footer language unless Ben explicitly requests it
never send before Ben visually verifies recipient, subject, body, footer/logo, and attachment
logo_rule: Use only the main-site WML logo image as the identity mark. Do not place separate WML / WML Legal / WE MAKE LAW LEGAL text beneath it.
link_rule: Website href=https://wemakelawlegal.com; Email href=mailto:legal@wemakelawlegal.com; both visibly underlined.
pdf_architecture_rule: Main packet narrative before source-record index
Submission Packet Complete appears once and only on the true final page
No appendix/evidence material after the outro
evidence_integrity_rule: Do not generate fake evidence screenshots. Use source pixels for visual evidence, or clearly label text as summary/index.
typography_rule: Legal-team tone; dense but readable; keep same-topic headings and paragraphs together; use deliberate paragraph spacing; avoid hollow pages and avoid splitting identical section concepts into separate pages.
public_repo_boundary: This public repo stores reusable format logic only. Do not commit private case PDFs, raw email captures, card data, transaction records, or recipient-specific details here unless Ben explicitly chooses public disclosure.
